final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a canned salmon recipe food photography image for Instagram.

风格/媒介: warm food photography, striking colors
构图:
  split-screen layout
  top half: flat lay of fresh ingredients (canned salmon chunks, lemon wedges, parsley, breadcrumbs)
  bottom half: golden-brown cooked salmon patties
  plain white banner with central title text in stylish yet clear handwritten font, readable at a glance
  "simmerrecipes.com" watermark at the bottom
主体: canned salmon recipe visual
场景/背景: flat lay ingredients top, plated cooked patties bottom
光线/氛围: warm food photography lighting
色彩方案:
材质/纹理:
文字(原样):
  title on white banner: "What is the correct way to eat canned salmon?"
  watermark: "simmerrecipes.com"
约束: text must be legible at a glance; handwritten font style
避免:
